name: position_id
description: UUID generated at insert; surrogate key for each observation

name: route_id
description: MTA route identifier; foreign key to routes.route_id

name: vehicle_id
description: MTA vehicle identifier as returned by SIRI

name: latitude
description: Vehicle latitude at time of observation

name: longitude
description: Vehicle longitude at time of observation

name: direction_ref
description: Inbound or outbound direction as returned by SIRI; required for per-direction frequency analysis

name: next_stop_ref
description: Stop ID of the next stop the vehicle is approaching; used to derive stop-level service frequency

name: bearing
description: Vehicle heading in degrees; captured for potential visualization use; not used in core analysis

name: collected_at
description: UTC timestamp at time of API call; partition key
